title: abutilon discissum
intro: Abutilon discissum, also known as Indian mallow or country mallow, is a plant species that belongs to the Malvaceae family. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to offer several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating skin conditions. Abutilon discissum can be prepared into herbal remedies, including infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which can be used to treat various ailments.
